Name: Ventra Collector — Microsoft 365 / Exchange
Description: Additional Entra and Exchange configuration for M365 Unified Audit Log Search (unified_audit_search). ARM and Graph permissions alone are not sufficient.

ApplicationPermissions.notes: Application permission on the Exchange Online API. Required for Search-UnifiedAuditLog.

DirectoryRoles.notes: Assign the Ventra service principal to Exchange Administrator (or a custom role with Search-UnifiedAuditLog) in Entra ID → Roles and administrators.

Prerequisites: Unified Audit Log must be enabled in Microsoft Purview compliance portal.
Management Activity API content feeds must be enabled for unified_audit (ActivityFeed.Read).
Default unified_audit_search lookback is 90 days; tenant retention may be 180 or 365 days.
